token.label: Max Tokens
token.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in the chat completion. The total length of input tokens and generated tokens is limited by the model's context length.

temperature.label: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls the randomness of responses, between 0 and 2. Higher values like 0.8 produce more creative output, while lower values like 0.2 produce more focused and deterministic output. We recommend adjusting either Temperature or Top-p, but not both. (Default: 1)

presencePenalty.label: Presence Penalty
presencePenalty.description: Number between -2.0 and 2.0. Positive values encourage the model to introduce new topics not yet mentioned in the conversation. (Default: 0)

topP.label: Top-p
topP.description: Number between 0 and 1. An alternative to Temperature — the model only considers tokens within the top p probability mass. For example, 0.1 means only tokens in the top 10% probability are considered. We recommend adjusting either Top-p or Temperature, but not both. (Default: 1)

frequencyPenalty.label: Frequency Penalty
frequencyPenalty.description: Number between -2.0 and 2.0. Positive values reduce the likelihood of the model repeating phrases it has already used. (Default: 0)

webSearch.label: Web Search
webSearch.description: Allow the model to search the web for up-to-date information. Supported by OpenAI gpt-4o, gpt-4.1 and compatible endpoints.

reasoningEffort.label: Reasoning
reasoningEffort.description: Controls how much thinking the model does before responding. Supported by OpenAI o1, o3, o4-mini and compatible reasoning models.
